summary: Web project with a bank finance section and an inquiry form connected to WhatsApp. User is iterating on UI enhancements.

existing_features.title: Add entrance and interactive animations to the BankFinanceBanner component. Include: a fade-in + slide-up animation when the section scrolls into view, a pulsing or glowing effect on the '90%' loan figure to draw attention, a subtle shimmer or shine sweep animation across the banner background, and a hover animation (scale + glow) on the WhatsApp CTA button. Use CSS keyframe animations or Tailwind animation utilities — no external animation libraries.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add animation to the bank finance section
